CustomField.description: When enabled, the framework automatically creates and maintains UoWScenario__c records for each unique scenario name. This enables lookup relationships and scenario-based analytics. When disabled, only the text-based TransactionScenarioName__c field is populated.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enable to automatically create UoWScenario__c records for scenarios and link them to audit transactions. Disable for lightweight text-only scenario tracking.
CustomField.label: Enable Scenario Record Tracking
